title: Clock palette tweak: dark Radix purple scale
description: Set three-hand clock default colors to dark-mode Radix purple tokens: top marker purple10, markers purple7, hour purple9, minute purple7, second purple5.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implementing default palette update in demo_three_hand_clock using dark-mode Radix purple tokens.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Applied default dark Radix purple palette in demo_three_hand_clock: top marker=dark.purple10, markers=dark.purple7, hour=dark.purple9, minute=dark.purple7, second=dark.purple5. Restarted live demo for visual verification.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Updated default center pivot color in demo_three_hand_clock to dark.purple5 and restarted live demo for visual confirmation.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Applied minute-hand motion visibility tweak: added sub-pixel minute-tip accent so minute progression is visible at 1-second cadence on the 64x64 grid. Restarted live demo for validation.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Superseded by unified pixooclock implementation and now included in committed defaults/face-band system.
